calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner's motion for an order striking claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories; Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents
Off Calendar Apr-13-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents: GRANTED. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
